zh.Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, Engla: 英國貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德 崔德
zh.Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德
zh.Cosford, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可可斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Warin de L'Isle於1269年出生在英國貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德 崔德時，他的父親Robert de L'Isle23歲，母親Mabel de Muscegros26歲。他於1288年與Alice de Montfort在英國貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1296年12月7日在英國貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德享年27歲。

zh-hans.Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, Engla: 英国貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德 崔德
zh-hans.Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England: 英国貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德
zh-hans.Cosford, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可可斯福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Warin de L'Isle于1269年出生在英国貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德 崔德时，他的父亲Robert de L'Isle23岁，母亲Mabel de Muscegros26岁。他于1288年与Alice de Montfort在英国貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1296年12月7日在英国貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: L'Isle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Warin de L'Isle was born in 1269, in Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Robert de L'Isle, was 23 and his mother, Mabel de Muscegros, was 26. He married Alice de Montfort in 1288, in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 7 December 1296, in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Warin de L'Isle est né en 1269, à Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de L'Isle, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mabel de Muscegros, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Montfort en 1288, à Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 7 décembre 1296, à Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Warin de L'Isle 1269 in Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de L'Isle 23 und seine Mutter Mabel de Muscegros 26. Er hat 1288 in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England Alice de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 7. Dezember 1296 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Warin de L'Isle è nato il nel 1269 nel Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de L'Isle, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mabel de Muscegros, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Montfort nel 1288, nel Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 7 dicembre 1296, nel Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England: イギリスベドフォードシュアイアビググレスワド

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Warin de L'Isleが1269年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアビググレスワド ハンドレドで生まれた時，父Robert de L'Isleは23歳，母Mabel de Muscegrosは26歳であった。1288年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアビググレスワドでAlice de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1296年12月7日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアビググレスワドで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Warin de L'Isle(이)가 1269년 영국 베드퍼드실르 비글레스웨이드 헌드레드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de L'Isle(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel de Muscegros(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1288년 영국 베드퍼드실르 비글레스웨이드에서 Alice de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1296년 12월 7일 영국 베드퍼드실르 비글레스웨이드에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Warin de L'Isle nasceu em 1269, em Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de L'Isle, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mabel de Muscegros, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Montfort em 1288, em Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1296, em Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Warin de L'Isle родился в 1269 г. в местности биглесвад хундред, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de L'Isle было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel de Muscegros, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Montfort в 1288 г. в местности биглесвад, бедфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 7 декабря 1296 г. в местности биглесвад, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Warin de L'Isle nació en 1269, en Biggleswade Hundred, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de L'Isle, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mabel de Muscegros, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alice de Montfort en 1288, en Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1296, en Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años.
